title: Zendesk Integration - Requester's email is not being mapped
excerpt:
Hello, 
I integrated our Zendesk with Monday.com but it seems the “Requester” is not showing email address when mapped. 
Is there a work around on this? Thank you and Happy New year!

posts.author: jvelasco08 (Justin Velasco)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Techryan (Techryan Inc.)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Justin, I am curious if you ever found a solution to this. I am having the same issue and have been unable to find any answers on how to resolve. Thanks-
